title: ChineseRefreshed
description: Optimizing Chinese character rendering with true pixel fonts.
body:
# ChineseRefreshed
This Resource Pack uses the true pixel font ‘Cubic 11’ for displaying Chinese characters. Perfectly matches the vanilla Latin typeface (aka 'Minecraft Seven') style, enhances the consistency of the in-game text display, and improves the gaming experience.

![Comparison](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd4a9c93f63328e2c827a1cedc8c0273313941ce.jpeg)
# Credit
Based on '[Cubic-11](https://github.com/ACh-K/Cubic-11)' by ACh-K.
